name: Stacker
description: Stacker — No-code client portal and internal tool builder that turns Airtable or Google Sheets into apps.

seo.title: Stacker — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Stacker: Stacker — No-code client portal and internal tool builder that turns Airtable or Google Sheets into apps.

when_to_use: Client portal built on Airtable data without React code
Customer-facing app connected to Google Sheets backend
Partner portal with login and role-based data views
Internal operations dashboard from existing Airtable base
No-code app for sharing data with external stakeholders

pros: Turns Airtable into usable client portals
Good for internal tools without code
Works with Google Sheets as backup source
cons: Performance lags on tables over 50k rows
Competes against cheaper Softr and Noloco
review.verdict: Strong choice for Airtable-powered client portals, though Softr and Noloco often win on price and features.
review.best_for: Consultancies and agencies building permissioned client portals from Airtable data
review.not_for: Teams needing low-cost no-code with custom design or large datasets
